# Article 103 - Synthetic EU AI Act Article 103

Effective date: 2025-08-02
Jurisdiction: EU

Providers Of General-Purpose Ai Models shall put in place a policy to comply with Union copyright law; non-compliance may be subject to administrative fines up to EUR 15M.
Providers shall preserve evidence for Article 103 where necessary for competent authority review.
This fixture is deterministic and supports compliance pipeline evaluation.
